fields.name: Worksheet Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the requisition worksheet template.
The program retrieves the name automatically from the Name field in the requisition worksheet template.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the requisition worksheet you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of the requisition worksheet name you are creating.

fields.name: Template Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the requisition worksheet template, such as requisition, subcontracting, or planning.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if the requisition worksheet is set up as a recurring worksheet.
For more information, see Recurring.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this worksheet.
